$comment: Single source of truth for the habitat rule pack. H2 wrapped existing rules; later slices add owning-tool gates such as H3 nx-boundaries and H4 Biome hygiene. Consumed by src/rules/architecture.ts (CLI, typed) and src/plugin.js (Nx target inference). Field semantics: docs/projects/habitat-harness/ + openspec/changes/habitat-harness-scaffold/design.md. ownerProject = the Nx project whose habitat:check target runs this rule. lane: enforced rules fail `habitat check`; advisory rules report only (matching pre-harness enforcement reality). detect runs from the repo root unless cwd is set.

rules.forbids: package-local scripts hiding workspace orchestration (--filter, --cwd against siblings, nested nx)
rules.why: Dependency freshness is root-orchestrated; hidden orchestration breaks the task graph and caching.
rules.message: Move workspace orchestration into root Nx scripts; keep package-local scripts leaf-local.

rules.forbids: mapgen canonical docs missing <toc>, ground-truth anchors, or with dead anchor paths
rules.why: MapGen docs are enforcement inputs (stage-order sync); broken anchors silently break that loop.
rules.message: Fix the reported doc anchors/toc; see docs/system/libs/mapgen/MAPGEN.md conventions.

rules.forbids: /base-standard/ imports outside packages/civ7-adapter
rules.why: The adapter is the sole owner of Civ7 engine surfaces; leaks make engine coupling untrackable.
rules.message: Move the /base-standard/ import into @civ7/adapter, or (with a tracking issue) extend the allowlist in scripts/lint/lint-adapter-boundary.sh.

rules.forbids: @civ7/direct-control imports in service contracts; schema exports from module contracts; contract-local re-exports from the public surface
rules.why: Contract files are the ownership boundary of the oRPC surface; leaks invert the layering.
rules.message: Keep contracts transport-pure; move schemas/implementations to their owning modules.

rules.forbids: ops importing adapter/context/map-projection/domain-root config; cross-domain deep imports; RNG/engine imports outside runtime layers (boundary profile)
rules.why: Domain ops stay pure and composable; the recipe layer owns composition.
rules.message: Route the import through the domain public surface (@mapgen/domain/<d>, /ops, /config.js).

rules.forbids: recipes importing domain internals instead of the three public surfaces
rules.why: Recipes compose domains only via @mapgen/domain/<d>, /ops, /config.js.
rules.message: Import the domain public surface, not its internals.

rules.forbids: G1-G11 normalization guard violations (stage isolation, catalogs, runtime imports, doc sync, placement contracts, viz ownership, sdk entrypoint isolation)
rules.why: The normalization train's invariants; see scripts/lint/lint-normalization-guardrails.mjs for the per-guard rationale.
rules.message: The failing guard names its own remediation; G-guards are documented in the script header.

rules.scope: the 9 projects with a lint script (eslint .)
rules.forbids: restricted-import/syntax rule families in eslint.config.js (8 families; ports to grit in H5)
rules.why: Current import-shape enforcement until the grit catalog (H5) and boundary config (H3) take ownership.
rules.message: Fix the reported eslint violation; rule families are documented inline in eslint.config.js.

rules.forbids: cross-project imports that violate docs/projects/habitat-harness/taxonomy.md §3 or bypass package entrypoints with relative/absolute project imports
rules.why: Project-plane architecture is graph law in H3: every workspace package carries kind:* tags and the tag constraints lock with an empty baseline.
rules.message: Fix the import edge or revise taxonomy.md and eslint.boundaries.config.mjs together with recorded provenance; do not weaken the boundary config ad hoc.

rules.scope: live repo files included by biome.json
rules.forbids: formatter drift, ordinary lint hygiene violations, and import-organization drift
rules.why: Biome owns the hygiene layer in H4; ESLint/Nx/Grit must not duplicate formatter or ordinary hygiene ownership.
rules.message: Run `bun run habitat:fix` or `bunx --bun @biomejs/biome check --write .`; keep generated/protected zones excluded in biome.json.

rules.forbids: recipe/map source deep-importing domain ops internals, ops-by-id, rules, or strategies
rules.why: Domain surfaces are named contracts; recipe/map code composes through public entrypoints.
rules.message: Import domain code through @mapgen/domain/<domain>, /ops, or /config.js rather than deep internals.

rules.forbids: recipes importing non-public domain subpaths
rules.why: Recipes compose domains only through stable public surfaces.
rules.message: Recipes may import @mapgen/domain/<domain>, @mapgen/domain/<domain>/ops, or /config.js only.

rules.forbids: Studio UI importing runtime recipe modules instead of artifact exports
rules.why: The browser UI consumes schema/default/meta artifacts; runtime recipes stay worker-side.
rules.message: MapGen Studio UI must import recipe artifacts, not runtime recipe modules.

rules.forbids: step contracts deep-importing domain internals or runtime ops
rules.why: Step contracts bind to domain contracts, not runtime implementation surfaces.
rules.message: Step contracts must import only from @mapgen/domain/<domain>.

rules.forbids: recipe compilation importing domain contract roots instead of runtime ops
rules.why: Compiled recipes use runtime op bundles; contracts are for step/domain boundaries.
rules.message: Recipe runtime files must import @mapgen/domain/<domain>/ops for runtime domains.

rules.scope: runtime recipe steps and domain strategies
rules.forbids: runtime layers importing TypeBox Value/TypeCompiler or mapgen compiler validation helpers
rules.why: Runtime layers rely on compile-time normalization, not live schema/default mutation.
rules.message: Runtime layers must not import TypeBox runtime validation or compiler normalization helpers.

rules.scope: runtime recipe steps and domain strategies
rules.forbids: runtime layers calling runValidated
rules.why: Validation belongs to authoring/compile time, not runtime op execution.
rules.message: Runtime layers must not call runValidated.

rules.scope: runtime recipe steps and domain strategies
rules.forbids: runtime layers redeclaring shared clamp/range/roll helpers
rules.why: Shared deterministic helpers live in @swooper/mapgen-core.
rules.message: Use shared helpers from @swooper/mapgen-core instead of redeclaring them.

rules.forbids: empty object defaults in schema definitions
rules.why: Object-level empty defaults hide absent user configuration; property defaults are explicit.
rules.message: Do not use empty object defaults in schema definitions; rely on property defaults.

rules.forbids: Civ7 adapter value imports, /base-standard paths, or runtime globals in mapgen-core
rules.why: mapgen-core is a pure TypeScript engine; Civ7 coupling belongs in adapters.
rules.message: Remove Civ7 runtime coupling from mapgen-core core/engine source.

rules.forbids: stage code importing another stage's steps implementation
rules.why: Stages compose through recipe/domain contracts, not sibling step internals.
rules.message: Do not import sibling stage steps; promote a contract or domain surface.

rules.forbids: domain-root tag/artifact catalogs
rules.why: Catalogs belong to owned public surfaces, not legacy root files.
rules.message: Move domain-root catalogs to the owning public surface.

rules.scope: standard recipe and map config source
rules.forbids: wrapper-only advanced stage config surfaces
rules.why: Standard recipe config must use supported step/domain config paths.
rules.message: Do not reintroduce wrapper-only `advanced` stage config surfaces.

rules.forbids: direct official resource/discovery generation calls in placement apply
rules.why: Placement outcomes are typed at the contract boundary before apply.
rules.message: Use typed placement outcomes instead of direct official generator calls.

rules.forbids: runtime /base-standard/ imports outside @civ7/adapter
rules.why: The adapter is the sole owner of Civ7 engine imports; provenance strings remain covered by the legacy wrapped rule until H6 adjudication.
rules.message: Move /base-standard/ runtime imports into @civ7/adapter.

rules.forbids: direct-control imports in contracts or contract-local schemas from public root
rules.why: oRPC contracts are transport-pure public contracts; runtime control stays in procedures/services.
rules.message: Keep control-oRPC contracts transport-pure and keep module-local schemas private.

rules.forbids: shared steps/viz.ts hubs or cross-step private viz imports
rules.why: Stable/shared visualization contracts are stage surfaces; step-private viz stays private.
rules.message: Use stages/<stage>/viz.ts for shared visualization contracts.

rules.forbids: SDK root importing/exporting ./mapgen or Civ7 adapter imports outside mapgen runtime subpath
rules.why: General SDK authoring APIs stay runtime-neutral; mapgen bindings are explicit opt-in.
rules.message: Keep Civ7 map runtime bindings behind @mateicanavra/civ7-sdk/mapgen.

rules.forbids: ops using adapter/context crossing constructs
rules.why: Domain ops stay pure and composable; adapter/context belongs outside domain implementation.
rules.message: Remove adapter/context crossing from domain ops.

rules.forbids: ops depending on map projection/effect artifact keys
rules.why: Domain ops should not encode runtime map artifact/effect dependencies.
rules.message: Remove map projection/effect dependency keys from domain ops.

rules.forbids: ops importing domain-root config facades via parent traversal
rules.why: Ops receive normalized config contracts; root config facades are composition surfaces.
rules.message: Do not import domain-root config facades from ops.

rules.forbids: staged hand-edits to generated Swooper map entrypoints
rules.why: Generated map entrypoints must be regenerated from canonical map configs.
rules.message: Generated Swooper map entrypoints are protected from hand edit.

rules.forbids: staged hand-edits to generated Civ7 declaration files
rules.why: Civ7 generated types are produced by the external resources workflow.
rules.remediate: Use the resources workflow documented in docs/process/resources-submodule.md.
rules.message: Generated Civ7 declaration files are protected from hand edit.

rules.forbids: staged hand-edits to generated Civ7 map-policy tables
rules.why: Map-policy tables must be regenerated from official resources.
rules.message: Generated Civ7 map-policy tables are protected from hand edit.

rules.forbids: Civ7 runtime references in mapgen-core production code
rules.why: mapgen-core is a pure TS engine; runtime coupling belongs to the adapter.
rules.message: Remove the Civ7 runtime reference; use adapter types only.

rules.forbids: engine RNG / official generators in authored generation
rules.why: Deterministic, seed-stable generation requires the authored RNG authority.
rules.message: Use the recipe RNG authority, never engine RNG.

rules.forbids: recipes bypassing public domain surfaces (test-level duplicate of mapgen-recipe-imports; retires in H6 once the grit equivalent locks)
rules.why: Belt-and-suspenders with the lint script until H5/H6 consolidation.
rules.message: Import the domain public surface, not its internals.

rules.forbids: ecology steps deep-importing ops/rules; presence of retired stage dirs
rules.why: Stage isolation + retired-structure absence.
rules.message: Compose via the recipe layer; do not resurrect retired stage directories.

rules.forbids: projection band algorithm regressions (domain-logic test; stays a test permanently)
rules.why: Correctness test invoked through the harness for one-stop verification; not harness-owned.
rules.message: Projection algorithm regression; see the test for the expected band.

rules.forbids: map bundles missing embedded workspace packages, TextEncoder bootstrap, or river markers
rules.why: Civ7 loads bundles as self-contained scripts; missing embeds fail only in-game. Requires a built tree.
rules.message: Rebuild mod-swooper-maps; if it persists, the bundling config regressed.

rules.forbids: op-calls-op in tectonics, dual contract paths, shim surfaces, foundation topology drift
rules.why: M-cutover structural invariants (coarse wrap of test:architecture-cutover).
rules.message: See the failing cutover test output for the violated invariant.

rules.forbids: ADR frontmatter/heading/path-hardcoding drift
rules.why: Doc tooling; manual today (advisory lane preserves pre-harness enforcement reality).
rules.message: Fix the ADR frontmatter/heading shape.

rules.forbids: vague-language regressions beyond the committed baseline
rules.why: Advisory doc-quality lane; its own baseline file is prior art for the ratchet.
rules.message: Reduce flagged ambiguity or update docs/.doc-ambiguity-lint-baseline.json per that tool's workflow.
